cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, sir! This is a call from Shoppers Stop. I hope you're doing great today, ji!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Ah, yes. I'm Biswajit Nath. How can I help you?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Wonderful to speak with you, Mr. Nath! We have a delivery scheduled for you today. Could you please confirm your address for me, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: It's B-101, Greenwood Apartments, near the park. You can't miss it, haan.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, great! That helps a lot. Is there a nearby landmark we could use to ensure our delivery person finds you easily, thik hai?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, there's a DCB Bank branch just opposite our apartment complex.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Excellent, sir! That's really helpful. We'll make sure to deliver your package right to your doorstep. You'll receive a call once it's on its way, okay?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: That sounds good. Thank you for confirming.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You're welcome, Mr. Nath. Have a fantastic day, and we look forward to serving you soon, sir!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: You too, thank you.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We're about to wrap up here. Just to confirm, we've noted your address and the landmark. All set for delivery now!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, all set.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: If you have any questions or need any assistance, please don't hesitate to reach out to us. We're always here to help, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thank you, I will. Bye for now.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You're welcome, Mr. Nath. Have a great day and we'll talk to you soon. Bye, sir!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Bye.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Take care, and we appreciate your business with Shoppers Stop!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: You're welcome. Appreciate it.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Great doing business with you, Mr. Nath. Looking forward to serving you again.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Likewise, thank you.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You're welcome, sir. All the best!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: You too, bye.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Bye, Mr. Nath. Have a wonderful day!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: You too.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: It was great speaking with you. We'll be in touch soon.

scenario_info.description: A legitimate [ECOMMERCE_PLATFORM] delivery agent calls the customer to confirm their address and ask for a nearby landmark. They do not ask for any personal or payment information.
